name: The Matchmaker | Thank You For 20K
description:
❝ 𝐓𝐞𝐥𝐥 𝐦𝐞, 𝐡𝐨𝐰 𝐝𝐨 𝐲𝐨𝐮 𝐟𝐞𝐞𝐥 𝐚𝐛𝐨𝐮𝐭 𝐦𝐞𝐧'𝐬 𝐬𝐰𝐢𝐦 𝐭𝐞𝐚𝐦𝐬? ❞

𝐓𝐡𝐞 𝐂𝐮𝐫𝐚𝐭𝐨𝐫 𝐝𝐨𝐧𝐬 𝐡𝐞𝐫 𝐦𝐚𝐭𝐜𝐡𝐦𝐚𝐤𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐠𝐚𝐫𝐛 𝐚𝐠𝐚𝐢𝐧.


𝐂 𝐎 𝐍 𝐓 𝐄 𝐍 𝐓・𝐖 𝐀 𝐑 𝐍 𝐈 𝐍 𝐆

Announcement Bot, Cringe Yapping and Sentimentality, A Matchmaker Who Might Get Horny?

⊱・𝐓 𝐇 𝐀 𝐍 𝐊・𝐘 𝐎 𝐔・⊰

So I lied. This isn't really about 20K since some of you already know it was never really about that for me. Honestly the 20K is just an excuse for me to express my gratitude to everyone again in general. Everyone's just been so encouraging and supportive to me from the start and until now both here and on Discord. I'm not exaggerating when I say I've teared up by the outpouring of love especially when I hit milestones like these. Just everyone showing up and saying such nice things to me means so much more than the milestone itself.

I'll be real. I joined Jani for two reasons mostly: to create and to talk with other pookies who loved fictional hotties. This has been beyond my expectations though because not only am I doing both those things, but now I get to be a part of a community of horny degens like me. I truly adore the creators and bot consumers I've gotten to know. Seriously I don't think I've met sweeter and hornier people and I absolutely love it.

I really wish I could list every creator and consumer to thank them but this would be a lot longer than it already is. But in all honesty it's pretty safe for me to say that if we've ever spoken, commented on each other's bots, or replied to each other, I'm so thankful that we got to interact no matter how small the interaction may have seemed. And I'm sorry if I'm not able to comment or reply to everyone as much as I did before, school and life has been overwhelming lately.

Big thanks to 𝐭𝐡𝐞 𝐂𝐚𝐫𝐧𝐚𝐥 𝐇𝐞𝐢𝐠𝐡𝐭𝐬 server. They've been there hyping me from the start of my botmaking journey when I was still at less than 50 followers and they're the ones who really helped me feel like a part of this community. Even now that I have my own server, I still like to think of Carnal as home. Hime, Memi, Sepha, thank you for creating such a wonderful community and for being so supportive of not just me but so many other creators. I'll always be grateful to you three for the advice and inspiration.

And I can't forget about my dearest Lu. Lu, I'm so grateful for every bit of support and every minute of VC on Discord you've given me. You've been there since the original volleyball boys and it means everything to me that you're still here cheering me on. I love you, wifey!
creator: Overlord Melvin
